_comment: MUDA/Progressive Bloc stances mapped to the doorstep issues in issues.json, for the EDITION=muda build only. RULES: every quote must be exact words visible in the cited source (text+who+source enforced by the sim); roles are AS AT the quote's date; REPORTED_POSITION items must never gain quote marks in copy; NO_VERIFIED_POSITION themes say so plainly. Beware: Armada = BERSATU's youth wing, NOT MUDA — never attribute Armada water-crisis statements to MUDA. Fact-check against sources[] before publishing.

themes.label_en: Low wages & the Singapore income drain
themes.stance_bm: MUDA menuntut gaji minimum bermaruah — RM1,500 kolar biru dan RM2,500 kolar putih (berdasarkan anggaran gaji sara hidup Bank Negara 2019) — dan dalam kempen 2026, pembangunan serta peluang kerja mesti sampai ke Johor utara (Muar, Tangkak, Segamat, Batu Pahat), bukan tertumpu di selatan.
themes.stance_en: MUDA demands a dignified minimum wage — RM1,500 blue-collar and RM2,500 white-collar (based on Bank Negara's 2019 living-wage estimates) — and in the 2026 campaign, that development and jobs reach northern Johor (Muar, Tangkak, Segamat, Batu Pahat) rather than concentrating in the south.

quotes.text: I'm proposing the government to increase the minimum wage to at least RM1,500 and for white-collar workers, the minimum should be RM2,500, according to estimates issued by Bank Negara Malaysia in 2019.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (ketika itu Presiden MUDA)

quotes.text: Do we want to normalise the idea that Johoreans must go to Singapore to earn a decent income?
quotes.role_bm: Setiausaha Agung MUDA, calon Simpang Jeram

themes.label_bm: Rumah mampu milik & lonjakan harga JS-SEZ
themes.label_en: Affordable housing & the JS-SEZ price surge
themes.stance_bm: Perumahan mampu milik ialah tunjang Blok Progresif (MUDA–PSM) 2026 — dan MUDA menentang dasar yang menggusur penghuni sedia ada: Syed Saddiq melabel Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar sebagai 'Akta Rampas Rumah' kerana ambang persetujuan diturunkan ke 80% dan penghuni flat B40/M40 berisiko digantikan kondominium mewah (Feb 2025). Manifesto PSM di Skudai paling konkrit: lebih banyak rumah mampu milik, kawalan sewa selaras pendapatan, dan rumah transit untuk keluarga muda. Nota jujur: tiada kenyataan MUDA khusus mengenai lonjakan 20.4% harga apartmen servis JB pasca-JS-SEZ ditemui.
themes.stance_en: Affordable housing is a core Progressive Bloc (MUDA–PSM) 2026 pillar — and MUDA fights policies that displace existing residents: Syed Saddiq branded the Urban Renewal Act a 'House Confiscation Act' over its consent threshold dropping to 80% and B40/M40 flat dwellers risking replacement by luxury condos (Feb 2025). PSM's Skudai manifesto is the most concrete: more genuinely affordable homes, rent controls in line with incomes, and transit homes for young families. Honest note: no MUDA statement specifically on the post-JS-SEZ 20.4% JB serviced-apartment price surge was found.

quotes.text: The first item is to provide more affordable houses while also controlling rental costs to ensure that they are in line with people's income.

quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), mengenai Akta Pembaharuan Semula Bandar
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), on the Urban Renewal Act

themes.stance_bm: Rekod banjir MUDA terdokumentasi: Misi #MariBantu Dis 2021 mengumpul RM2 juta+ daripada 40,000 penderma untuk mangsa banjir 8 negeri — parti Malaysia pertama menerbitkan audit pihak ketiga untuk dana kemanusiaan (calon Maharani Amir Fiqri ialah Pengarah Logistik misi itu). Di Parlimen: usul tergempar darurat iklim (Dis 2022), soalan PMQT kepada PM mengenai langkah proaktif banjir (Feb 2025 — jawapan merekodkan projek TBBT RM1.64b Johor: Segamat, Batu Pahat, Ledang). Kempen 2026: Rashifa menjadikan penamatan banjir Puteri Wangsa ikrar utamanya; '5 Tekad' Ainie merangkumi kesiapsiagaan banjir.
themes.stance_en: MUDA's flood record is documented: the Dec 2021 #MariBantu mission raised RM2m+ from 40,000 donors for flood victims in 8 states — the first Malaysian party to publish a third-party audit of humanitarian funds (Maharani candidate Amir Fiqri was its Logistics Director). In Parliament: an urgent climate-emergency motion (Dec 2022) and a PMQT question on proactive flood steps (Feb 2025 — the answer put Johor's RM1.64b TBBT projects on record: Segamat, Batu Pahat, Ledang). In 2026: Rashifa made ending Puteri Wangsa's floods her lead pledge; Ainie's '5 Tekad' includes flood preparedness.

quotes.text: Don't wait too long if water levels start to rise. Move to safer areas as soon as possible. Your lives are more valuable than your belongings.
quotes.role_bm: ADUN Puteri Wangsa ketika itu (kini Presiden MUDA)
quotes.role_en: then Puteri Wangsa assemblywoman (now MUDA president)

quotes.text: As the MP of Muar, my application to help the people in Muar was rejected!

themes.stance_bm: Nota jujur: TIADA kenyataan MUDA yang disahkan mengenai krisis paip kering JB (Mei 2025), pencemaran Sungai Johor akibat pecahan kolam cucian lombong pasir (Nov 2025) atau pencemaran Sungai Skudai (Jan 2025). Yang terdekat: tunjang kelestarian alam Blok Progresif, manifesto alam sekitar PSM Skudai (kawalan pencemaran lebih ketat, penyelenggaraan sungai, perunding EIA bebas), dan soalan saliran/banjir Amira di DUN Johor. AWAS: kenyataan lantang krisis air Nov 2025 datang dari Armada (sayap BERSATU — bukan MUDA), Amanah dan PAS — jangan salah petik.
themes.stance_en: Honest note: NO verified MUDA statement was found on the JB dry-taps crisis (May 2025), the Sungai Johor sand-mine washing-pond pollution (Nov 2025) or the Sungai Skudai pollution (Jan 2025). Nearest positions: the Progressive Bloc's environmental-sustainability pillar, PSM Skudai's environment manifesto (stricter pollution controls, river maintenance, independent EIA consultants), and Amira's drainage/flood questions in the Johor DUN. CAUTION: the loud Nov 2025 water-crisis statements came from Armada (BERSATU's wing — not MUDA), Amanah and PAS — do not misquote.

themes.stance_bm: MUDA menyokong RTS Link tetapi memberi amaran di Dewan Rakyat (Feb 2026) bahawa tanpa sistem penyuraian trafik, kesesakan Tambak hanya berpindah ke Bukit Chagar — sehingga 30,000 orang tertumpu di satu tempat pada waktu puncak, sementara 'sky bus' penyuap dianggar siap 2035 sedangkan RTS dibuka Jan 2027. Di lapangan: separuh aduan pusat khidmat Puteri Wangsa MUDA ialah isu jalan; Rashifa menerbitkan video penerangan bidang kuasa jalan (majlis/JKR) dan saluran aduan SISPAA.
themes.stance_en: MUDA supports the RTS Link but warned in the Dewan Rakyat (Feb 2026) that without traffic dispersal the Causeway jam simply moves to Bukit Chagar — up to 30,000 people concentrated at peak, while the feeder 'sky bus' is estimated to finish only in 2035 against RTS opening Jan 2027. On the ground: half the complaints at MUDA's Puteri Wangsa service centre are road issues; Rashifa published an explainer on road jurisdiction (councils/JKR) and the SISPAA complaints channel.

quotes.text: Once people exit Bukit Chagar, we will see human congestion jammed shoulder to shoulder because there is no effective traffic dispersion system.

themes.stance_bm: Syed Saddiq membangkitkan isu tarif AS di sidang khas Dewan Rakyat (5 Mei 2025): menuntut kerajaan berterus terang mengenai impak ekonomi, bertanya langkah khusus untuk industri perabot Muar (eksport RM10b+) termasuk risiko transshipment, dan kemudian menuntut ketelusan syarikat mana menerima pengecualian cukai. (Kedudukan dilaporkan — tiada petikan kata demi kata yang dapat disahkan; jangan gunakan tanda petik.)
themes.stance_en: Syed Saddiq raised the US-tariff threat in the special Dewan Rakyat sitting (5 May 2025): demanding honesty about the economic impact, asking what specific help Muar's furniture industry (RM10b+ exports) would get, flagging transshipment risk, and later demanding transparency on which companies received tax exemptions. (Reported positions — no verbatim quote could be verified; do not add quotation marks.)

themes.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: peruntukan kawasan mesti sama rata untuk semua Ahli Parlimen tanpa mengira parti — menahannya melanggar Perkara 8(1) Perlembagaan. Syed Saddiq membawa isu ini sehingga Mahkamah Persekutuan (kebenaran merayu diberi Mac 2026), dan sementara itu membiayai sendiri khidmat Muar — termasuk menjadi model untuk mendapatkan sumbangan RM1 juta — sebelum akhirnya menerima RM200,000 (bersyarat, Julai 2025).
themes.stance_en: MUDA's position: constituency allocations must be equal for every MP regardless of party — withholding them breaches Article 8(1) of the Constitution. Syed Saddiq took the fight to the Federal Court (leave to appeal granted March 2026), and meanwhile self-funded Muar's services — including taking a modelling job to raise RM1 million — before finally receiving RM200,000 (with conditions, July 2025).

quotes.text: Saya terpaksa jadi model… akhirnya dapat sumbangan RM1 juta untuk Parlimen Muar
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar, bahas titah diraja Dewan Rakyat
quotes.role_en: Muar MP, royal-address debate in the Dewan Rakyat

themes.stance_bm: Tawaran teras MUDA 2026: keempat-empat calon mengisytiharkan aset secara terbuka (RM23,000–RM476,236), ikrar utama memansuhkan undang-undang lima ADUN lantikan Johor, dan Presiden Amira Aisya mengecam penggunaan jentera kerajaan untuk kempen. Nota: Syed Saddiq tidak berkempen — keputusan rayuan Mahkamah Persekutuan ditangguh ke 13 Julai 2026, dua hari selepas pengundian.
themes.stance_en: MUDA's core 2026 offer: all four candidates publicly declared assets (RM23,000–RM476,236), the signature pledge is abolishing Johor's five appointed-ADUN law, and President Amira Aisya has called out the use of government machinery for campaigning. Note: Syed Saddiq is not campaigning — the Federal Court deferred his appeal verdict to 13 July 2026, two days after polling.

quotes.text: I don't have any political baggage. Some may say I'm inexperienced, but I'm inexperienced in corruption. I'm inexperienced in taking any bribe from any political parties.

themes.stance_bm: Kos sara hidup ialah teras kempen MUDA Johor 2026 — manifesto '5 Tekad' Ainie Haziqah di Simpang Jeram meletakkannya di tempat pertama, merangkumi bukan sahaja harga barang tetapi kos taska, prasekolah dan pengangkutan keluarga muda (Julai 2026). Di peringkat nasional, Syed Saddiq mengetuai kritikan terhadap pelaksanaan subsidi RON95 bersasar dalam perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 (Okt 2024): jangan umumkan pemotongan sebelum kumpulan T15 ditakrifkan, kerana rakyat sudah mendengar apa yang bakal hilang.
themes.stance_en: Cost of living is the core of MUDA's 2026 Johor campaign — Ainie Haziqah's '5 Tekad' manifesto in Simpang Jeram puts it first, covering not just goods prices but childcare, preschool and transport costs for young families (July 2026). Nationally, Syed Saddiq led criticism of the targeted RON95 subsidy rollout in the 2025 Budget debate (Oct 2024): don't announce cuts before the T15 group is even defined, because people have already heard what they stand to lose.

quotes.text: This is the problem when we announce first and think later.
quotes.role_bm: Ahli Parlimen Muar (pengasas bersama MUDA), perbahasan Belanjawan 2025 mengenai sasaran subsidi RON95/T15
quotes.role_en: Muar MP (MUDA co-founder), 2025 Budget debate on RON95/T15 subsidy targeting

themes.label_bm: SST diperluas, cukai barangan mewah dibatalkan
themes.label_en: SST expansion while the luxury-goods tax was scrapped
themes.stance_bm: Pendirian MUDA: keadilan cukai — kerajaan memperluas SST ke atas barangan dan perkhidmatan harian rakyat, tetapi membatalkan terus Cukai Barangan Bernilai Tinggi (HVGT) ke atas golongan ultra-kaya (Julai 2025). Cukai elit dahulu sebelum membebankan rakyat.
themes.stance_en: MUDA's position: tax fairness — the government expanded SST onto everyday goods and services while completely scrapping the High Value Goods Tax (HVGT) on the ultra-rich (July 2025). Tax the elites before burdening the rakyat.

quotes.text: This is yet another step that shows the hypocrisy of the Madani Government. They once said they wanted to tax the ultra-rich, but the plan to introduce a tax like HVGT has been completely abandoned.
